perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white fuzzy cardigan, stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She holds a transparent plastic container filled with a pasta salad and speaks to the camera. (2) The camera provides a close-up of the salad, highlighting the prosciutto, mozzarella balls, leafy greens, and rotini pasta. (3) The setting changes to an indoor apartment dining area. The woman is joined by a friend wearing a zebra-print bucket hat. They are both eating the salad and gesturing while discussing its flavor and texture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin against a backdrop of upbeat, rhythmic electronic background music. Faint ambient noise of a busy warehouse is audible. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the speaker provides a detailed description of the food items. (3) The soundscape shifts to two female voices in a conversational dialogue. Occasional chime-like sound effects (SFX) occur simultaneously with the appearance of text overlays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo. Decorative Text: '最新299元' (New 299 NTD) and '生火腿義麵沙拉' (Prosciutto Pasta Salad) appearing in bold, colorful fonts with a promotional tone. (2) Effect Text: '上面有好多火腿' (Lots of ham on top) and '莫札瑞拉起司' (Mozzarella Cheese), conveying excitement. (3) Functional Text: '葡萄油醋汁調的超級好' (Grapeseed oil vinegar dressing is made very well) and '感覺很營養' (Feels very nutritious), serving as a review summary.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at retail location -> Ingredient close-up -> Home tasting and final verdict

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male shopper in background, 1 female shopper in background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long dark hair in a white fluffy coat; another woman with a black-and-white zebra-patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco interior with industrial shelving and other shoppers, followed by a clean, modern home interior with a dining table.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Context -> Inspection -> Evaluation -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a comprehensive review of a new food product from Costco. The video aims to inform the audience about the item's price, contents, and taste through a combination of on-site discovery and at-home consumption, helping viewers decide whether to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The tone is balanced and includes minor criticisms about the ratio of ingredients (too much pasta), suggesting an independent review rather than a paid endorsement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density text overlays with vibrant colors and variety-show style sound effects.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows the 'shopping haul/review' trend popular among Taiwanese food influencers, focusing on high-value warehouse club items.
